infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Hydro AI uses the camera to photograph your drink and estimate how much you've had. Photos are processed and discarded — only the volume is saved.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Hydro AI lets you add a drink from your camera roll if you forgot to log it in the moment.

plugins.cameraPermission: Hydro AI uses the camera to photograph your drink and estimate how much you've had.

plugins.photosPermission: Hydro AI lets you add a drink from your camera roll if you forgot to log it in the moment.
